text.title: SSL/TLS Management: Concepts
text.summary: Three certificate strategies for a VPS: Let's Encrypt (90-day auto-renew, direct exposure), Cloudflare origin cert (15-year, no renewal, requires Cloudflare proxy), hybrid (both valid). Four Cloudflare SSL modes — always use Full(Strict), never Flexible.

section.title: Certificate Types
section.p: Choose based on whether the domain uses Cloudflare proxy (orange cloud) or DNS-only (gray cloud).

list.item: Let's Encrypt — free, 90-day, auto-renewed by certbot systemd timer. Works with or without Cloudflare. Supports OCSP stapling.
Cloudflare origin cert — free, 15 years, no renewal needed. Only trusted by Cloudflare edge (not by browsers directly). OCSP stapling not available.
Self-signed — never use in production. Cloudflare reports 526 Invalid SSL Certificate.

rule.statement: Always use Full(Strict) when behind Cloudflare. Never use Flexible.
rule.rationale: Flexible mode sends traffic from Cloudflare to your origin over plain HTTP. If nginx also enforces HTTPS redirects (as it should), this creates an infinite redirect loop (ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS).

list.item: Off — HTTP everywhere, no encryption. Never use.
Flexible — HTTPS browser→CF, HTTP CF→origin. Creates redirect loops + false security sense. Never use.
Full — HTTPS CF→origin but accepts any certificate (self-signed OK). Better than Flexible but not recommended.
Full(Strict) — HTTPS CF→origin, validates certificate. Use this. Requires a valid cert (origin cert or Let's Encrypt).

section.title: TLS Versions
section.p: Drop TLS 1.0 and 1.1 entirely. Minimum is TLS 1.2. TLS 1.3 is preferred — faster handshake, no cipher selection by server.

rule.statement: Only enable OCSP stapling with Let's Encrypt or commercial certificates. Disable for Cloudflare origin certs.
rule.rationale: Cloudflare origin certs are not issued by a public CA and have no OCSP responder. Enabling ssl_stapling with them causes nginx to log errors and potentially degrade TLS performance.

see-also.link: nginx site with Cloudflare origin cert
